sections.paragraph:
Original: צרפת

Transliteration: tsârephath

Phonetic: tsaq-ref-ath'

BDB Definition:

Zarephath = "refinery"
  1. a city on the coast south of Sidon and the residence of Elijah during the last part of the drought; modern 'Sura-fend'

Origin: from H6884

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
